description.value:
Hierophant

The Hierophant is a leader of faith, a preacher and demagogue who commands the hearts and minds of those around them. Whether they serve the Imperial Creed, a forbidden cult, or simply their own ambitions, the Hierophant possesses an extraordinary force of personality and an unshakeable will. They inspire loyalty, crush dissent, and rally the faithful through the sheer power of their conviction.

Role Aptitudes

Fellowship, Leadership, Social, Toughness, Willpower

Role Talent

Hatred (one) or Jaded

Role Bonus

Sway the Masses: In addition to the normal uses of Fate Points, a Hierophant may spend a Fate Point to automatically succeed at a Charm, Command, or Intimidate Test with a number of Degrees of Success equal to their Fellowship Bonus.

specialAbilities.name: Sway the Masses
specialAbilities.description: In addition to the normal uses of Fate Points, a Hierophant may spend a Fate Point to automatically succeed at a Charm, Command, or Intimidate Test with a number of Degrees of Success equal to their Fellowship Bonus.
